"'''Talnar's Tatooine Traitor'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Sterling Hershey]] in [[2004]]. It depicts a skirmish on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] between [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] led by Lieutenant [[Talnar]], and a squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]].

==Plot summary==
LT [[Talnar]], one of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] best procurement agents, is pursuing a deal in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] with [[Orex]] and his gang of tech runners. Their relationship is fraught with tension.

During a negotiating session, Orex discovers that his private data stores had been accessed and the information relating to his deals with the Rebels have been stolen. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] then launches a raid based on the traitor's info. The Rebels then fight to escape with their data on Orex's tech.
